DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S BOLCHIULAUN DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO SET 1; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY. CCP 1005 REQUIRES THAT THIS MOTION BE FILED AND SERVED AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-07-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS XIUYAN JIANG, AND GUOMING HUANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S BOLCHIULAUN DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO SET 1; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF BUYANKHAND BOLCHIULAUN TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED. BOLCHIULAUN SHALL PROVIDE COMPLETE AND VERIFIED WRITTEN RESPONSES BY JULY 14, 2025. THE COURT FINDS THAT BOLCHIULAUN'S FAILURE TO RESPOND TO DISCOVERY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS AND IMPOSES SANCTIONS OF $500 PAYABLE TO DEFENDANTS BY JULY 14, 2025. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Bolchiulaun Discovery Responses To Set 1; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Thereof; Declaration Of Nathan N. Wang With Exhibits; [Proposed] Order Granting Defendant'S Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS XIUYAN JIANG, AND GUOMING HUANG's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Bolchiulaun Discovery Responses To Set 1; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to compel plaintiff Buyankhand Bolchiulaun to respond to defendants' Form Interrogatories Set One, Special Interrogatories, Request for Production of Documents, and Request for Statement of Damages is granted. Bolchiulaun shall provide complete and verified written responses by July 14, 2025. The court finds that Bolchiulaun's failure to respond to discovery was a misuse of the discovery process and imposes sanctions of $500 payable to Defendants by July 14, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Bolchiulaun Discovery Responses To Set 1; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Thereof; Declaration Of Nathan N. Wang With Exhibits; [Proposed] Order Granting Defendant'S Motion To Compel
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S BOLCHIULAUN DISCOVERY RESPONSES TO SET 1; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

Appearances: Buyankhand Bolchiulaun (no phone number provided), plaintiff and responding party appearing without counsel of record; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as untimely. CCP 1005 requires that this motion be filed and served at least 16 court days before the hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. NICHOLAS PETERSON, Esq. of Kerley Schaffer LLP (tel: 510-379-5801) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF BUYANKHAND BOLCHIULAUN.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF BUYANKHAND BOLCHIULAUN.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order in the appropriate judicial counsel form.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)
